description: Style NoteThese globalite StarTech shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek shoe. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt.Product DetailsGrey mesh upper with synthetic overlays and blue trimsMesh inner and tongueThick midsole grooved at the peripheryTwo piece TPU outsole with horizontal groovesThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
